Document Library

Governing Documents and Policies

Technology Licensing and Membership

  • ODVA Application and Agreement for Membership and Terms of Usage (TOU)
    Request the Application and Agreement to provide ODVA with some essential information about your company. ODVA will send the Application directly to your authorized representative to be completed electronically. Applicants may download the Application and Agreement for Membership and Terms of Usage review copy prior to completing the online form.
    Pub 357
  • Brand Standards + Identity Guidelines
    Pub 36

Conformance Testing

  • ODVA Specification Mandatory Change List R21 
    Pub 317
  • Policy Regarding Compliant Products
    Pub 8
  • Technology Management for Conformance Test Policy (Addendum to Pub 8 Policy Regarding Compliant Products)
    Pub 261

Organization Governance

  • ODVA Bylaws
    Pub 30
  • Policy Regarding Intellectual Property
    Pub 207
  • Policy for Conduct of ODVA Activities for Compliance with Antitrust and Competition Laws
    Pub 67
  • Policy for Dispute Resolution
    Pub 350
  • Opening Statement for Meetings of ODVA Special Interest Groups (“SIGs”)
    Pub 222
  • Application and Agreement to Participate in ODVA Work Groups
    Online form for ODVA work group participation.

Technical Documents

Common Industrial Protocol

  • The Common Industrial Protocol
    Pub 122
  • The Common Industrial Protocol (CIP) and the Family of CIP Networks
    Pub 123

EtherNet/IP

  • Technology Overview Series: EtherNet/IP
    Pub 138
  • EtherNet/IP Interoperability Test Procedures
    Pub 95
  • EtherNet/IP Media Planning & Installation Manual
    English   |   Japanese
    Pub 148
  • EtherNet/IP Network Infrastructure Guide
    Pub 35
  • Performance Test Methodology for EtherNet/IP Devices
    Pub 81
  • Performance Test Terminology for EtherNet/IP Devices 
    Pub 80
  • Recommended Functionality for EtherNet/IP Devices
    Pub 70
  • Recommended IP Addressing Methods for EtherNet/IP™ Devices 
    Pub 28
  • Recommended Operation for Switches Running Relay Agent and Option 82
    Pub 88
  • Guidelines for Using Device Level Ring (DLR) with EtherNet/IP
    Pub 316
  • Quick Start for Vendors
    Pub 213

DeviceNet

  • Technology Overview Series: DeviceNet
    Pub 26
  • DeviceNet Planning and Installation Manual
    Pub 27
  • DeviceNet Plant Floor Troubleshooting Guide
    Pub 147

CompoNet

  • Technology Overview Series: CompoNet
    Pub 161
  • CompoNet 敷設マニュアル [CompoNet Installation Guide]
    Pub 315, available in Japanese only

ControlNet

  • Technology Overview Series: ControlNet
    Pub 200

CIP Safety

  • CIP Safety: Safety Networking for Today and Beyond
    Pub 110
  • CIP Safety: Wireless Functional Safety
    Pub 343
    English   |   Japanese

CIP Security and Cybersecurity Best Practices

  • CIP Security at a Glance
    Pub 319
  • CIP Security: A Valuable Tool for CRA Compliance
    Pub 356
  • FAQ on Industrial Ethernet Security Concepts
    Industrial Ethernet Security Harmonization Group
  • Securing EtherNet/IP Networks
    Pub 269

CIP Motion

  • Performance without Compromise
    Pub 288
  • EtherNet/IP™ for Real-Time, Machine-to-Machine Control
    Pub 279

Process Automation

  • Process Automation: EtherNet/IP at the Field Device Level
    Pub 349
  • Ethernet To the Field: Ethernet-APL
    English   |   Japanese
